title: Reset Password
content: Users can reset their password from Settings > Security. Click on 'Change Password', verify your old password, and enter a new strong password containing at least 8 characters, a number, and a special character.

title: Account Deletion
content: Users can delete their account permanently from Account Settings > Danger Zone. Once requested, your account data will be wiped out within 14 business days. This action is irreversible.

title: Two-Factor Authentication
content: Enable Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) by navigating to Settings > Security > Two-Factor Authentication. You can use authenticator apps like Google Authenticator or Authy to scan the QR code.

title: Refund Policy
content: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for all subscription plans. If you are unsatisfied, contact billing support to request a full refund within 30 days of purchase.
